LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PAUL MONTWILLO'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY DEFENSE COUNSEL DAVID WONG. ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIES SAID MOTION. THE RECORD APPEARS TO ESTABLISH THAT MR. WONG WAS COUNSEL FOR A.A.P. THIS DISPUTE CENTERS ON THE RIGHTS OF THE TWO PARTIES WHO FORMED AND OPERATED A.A.P. THE OPINIONS OF THE STATE BAR MAKE CLEAR THE OBLIGATION OF CORPORATE COUNSEL TO REPRESENT ONLY THE INTERESTS OF THE CORPORATION AND NOT THE INTERESTS OF ONE OWNER OVER ANOTHER. HOWEVER, EXHIBITS F THROUGH H OF THE WONG DECLARATION APPEAR TO ESTABLISH THAT THE CONFLICT HAS BEEN WAIVED. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL MAKES AN ORAL MOTION FOR SANCTIONS. COURT DECLINES TO RULE ON THE MOTION AND INDICATES THAT IF COUNSEL WISHES TO CALENDAR A MOTION, AFTER READING THE APPROPRIATE CODE SECTIONS, COURT WILL CONSIDER THE MOTION. MR. WONG IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF PAUL MONTWILLO'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY DEFENSE COUNSEL DAVID WONG.
APPEARANCES: JACOB W. SIDER, ESQUIRE (SOMMERS LAW GROUP, 415.839.8569) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DAVID. Y. WONG, ESQUIRE (415.339.0430) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIES SAID MOTION. THE RECORD APPEARS TO ESTABLISH THAT MR. WONG WAS COUNSEL FOR A.A.P. THIS DISPUTE CENTERS ON THE RIGHTS OF THE TWO PARTIES WHO FORMED AND OPERATED A.A.P. THE OPINIONS OF THE STATE BAR MAKE CLEAR THE OBLIGATION OF CORPORATE COUNSEL TO REPRESENT ONLY THE INTERESTS OF THE CORPORATION AND NOT THE INTERESTS OF ONE OWNER OVER ANOTHER. HOWEVER, EXHIBITS F THROUGH H OF THE WONG DECLARATION APPEAR TO ESTABLISH THAT THE CONFLICT HAS BEEN WAIVED. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL MAKES AN ORAL MOTION FOR SANCTIONS. COURT DECLINES TO RULE ON THE MOTION AND INDICATES THAT IF COUNSEL WISHES TO CALENDAR A MOTION, AFTER READING THE APPROPRIATE CODE SECTIONS, COURT WILL CONSIDER THE MOTION. MR. WONG IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/AP) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
